info.description:
Public HTTP API for Peer Ledger. The gateway is the only external entrypoint and orchestrates the internal gRPC services.
Authenticated routes require a bearer JWT issued by the gateway after register or login.
info.title: Peer Ledger Gateway API

post.description: Validates credentials through user-service and returns a bearer JWT.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and a rotated refresh token.
Creates a user in user-service, provisions the wallet, and returns a bearer JWT.

get.description: Lightweight liveness endpoint for the public gateway.
Returns the transaction history for the authenticated user. The JWT subject must match the path user ID.
Returns paginated activity for the authenticated user, including transfers and topups.
Returns an aggregated summary for the authenticated user's dashboard home.
Returns the profile of the authenticated user.
Returns paginated topup history for the authenticated user.
Returns the current balance and topup summary for the authenticated user.

post.description: Credits funds to the authenticated user's wallet.
Runs user validation, fraud evaluation, wallet transfer, and transaction recording for the authenticated sender.

get.description: Reads user profile data from user-service.
Queries user-service for existence of a user ID.

message.example: transfer executed in wallet-service but failed to record audit transaction
user created but wallet provisioning failed

BearerAuth.description: Bearer JWT issued by the gateway. Format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
